properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause I'm in love I cannot remember what I was doing before I met You I've been captivated By the love that saved me And I'm in love I cannot remember what I was doing before I met You I've been captivated By love that saved me, You saved me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I'm in love I cannot remember What I was doing before I met You I've been captivated By love that saved me And I'm in love I cannot remember What I was doing before I met You I've been captivated By a love that saved me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Cause You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And this is why we thank You, this is why we thank You This is why we thank You, this is why we thank You This is why we thank You, this is why we thank You This is why we thank You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And this is why we thank You, this is why we thank You This is why we thank You, this is why we thank You This is why we thank You, this is why we thank You

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love That You saved me, You saved me Now I will never leave Your love
